summary: Verified Agora Video SDK integration replacing Jitsi across all platforms. Backend API tests passed (10/10). Portal and Expo builds succeeded. Code review confirms correct implementation.
critical_code_review_comments: JitsiMeetComponent.tsx still exists in /app/frontend/src/components/ but is no longer imported by EventsSection.tsx - can be removed for cleanup
The variable name 'activeJitsiEvent' in portal EventsTabs is misleading since it now uses Agora - consider renaming to 'activeVideoEvent' for clarity

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Portal build succeeded, Expo web export succeeded

seed_data_creation: N/A - Used existing events from database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agora Video SDK integration verified. Key findings: (1) Backend /api/events/upcoming returns events list correctly. (2) Backend /api/events/{id}/join returns agora_channel and agora_app_id fields alongside jitsi_room_name for backwards compatibility. (3) Channel name pattern is consistent: radiocheck_event{id} across all platforms. (4) Admin and Staff portal EventsTabs show Join button for virtual/hybrid events (not just live ones). (5) Mobile app EventsSection uses AgoraMeetComponent instead of JitsiMeetComponent. (6) Portal build (yarn build) and Expo web export (npx expo export --platform web) both succeed.

backend_events_upcoming.details: GET /api/events/upcoming returns list of events with required fields including jitsi_room_name

backend_events_join_agora_fields.details: POST /api/events/{id}/join returns agora_channel and agora_app_id fields

channel_name_pattern_consistency.details: Channel name pattern radiocheck_event{id} is consistent between backend, mobile app, and portal

admin_portal_join_button.details: Admin EventsTab shows Join button for virtual/hybrid events (live OR upcoming)

staff_portal_join_button.details: Staff EventsTab shows Join button for all virtual/hybrid events

mobile_app_agora_component.details: EventsSection imports and uses AgoraMeetComponent instead of JitsiMeetComponent

expo_web_build.details: npx expo export --platform web completed successfully
